scenarios.name: rabbitmq-task-queue-with-dlq
scenarios.rationale: Treatment wires prefetch, durable queue with x-dead-letter-exchange, persistent publishes, and ack/nack handling exactly as the skill teaches, while the baseline often misses the DLX queue argument or the persistent flag.

scenarios.name: rabbitmq-topic-routing
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses assertExchange('events','topic'), bindQueue with order.created/payment.*/# routing keys, and channel.publish with routing keys exactly as documented, while the baseline gets the topology mostly right but may bind the wrong patterns or omit durability.
